hero.headline: The system isn't broken. It's designed to take a cut of everything you earn.
hero.subheadline: You're losing 2 to 3% on every card payment. And the cash in your bank? It's earning returns for everyone except you. That changes now.

twoWorlds.header: Two ways the system costs you.

cardA.headline: If you accept card payments
cardA.body:
Every time a customer pays with a card, you lose 2 to 3%.

On $1,000 a day in sales, that's $600 to $900 a month. Gone. Then the money takes 3 to 5 business days to reach your account. Your money, sitting in someone else's pocket, earning them interest.

What if you kept all of it?

cardB.headline: If your company has cash sitting idle
cardB.body:
You raised money. You're spending it carefully. But the cash you're not using right now? Your bank puts it to work, earns returns, and pays you almost nothing.

On $500,000 idle, the gap between what your bank pays and what's possible could be tens of thousands a year.

What if that money worked for you instead?
cardB.cta: See what your bank is keeping

paymentFees.title: Payment Fees
paymentFees.subtitle: On a $1,000 daily card sales, average 3% processing fee. It costs your business $900/month or more than $10,000 in one year.
paymentFees.tagline: You have the chance not only to cut costs, but to transform it into a new revenue line.
paymentFees.source: Example based on $1,000/day in card sales at 3% processing fee, with savings invested at a 10% average in annual return (derived 2026-05-13 via scripts/derive-b2b-card-numbers.mjs). Projected returns are illustrative. Actual results may vary.

idleCash.title: Idle Cash
idleCash.subtitle: On a $100,000 idle cash sitting in your business account.
idleCash.tagline: You have the chance to double or more your returns and fully control your money.
idleCash.source: Example based on $100,000 idle cash with a 3.5% high-yield business savings rate (Bankrate) vs diBoaS Conservative 7% in digital dollar (derived 2026-05-13 via scripts/derive-b2b-card-numbers.mjs). Projected returns are illustrative. Actual results may vary.

paragraphs.0: Our founder's grandmother saved half of everything she earned her entire life. Her bank paid her almost nothing.
paragraphs.1: She didn't know there were better options. Nobody told her. The language was too complicated. The minimums were too high. The institutions didn't care about people with small savings.
paragraphs.2: We've seen the same thing happen with businesses. Coffee shops losing $10,000 a year to card fees. Startups with half a million in the bank earning less than $200 a month in interest.
paragraphs.4: New technology made it possible to go around the gatekeepers. We just had to build the door.

connect.title: Connect your business
connect.description: Link your business account. Two-minute setup. No technical integration needed. No developer. No downtime. You do it during your morning coffee.

rules.title: You set the rules
rules.description: Tell us your floor. "Always keep $50,000 available." Everything above that? Put it to work. You set the rules. You change them anytime.

works.title: Your money works
works.description: Your idle cash starts earning. Payments arrive in seconds, not days. Your processing fees drop from 3% to zero. And you didn't have to think about any of it.

access.title: Access anytime
access.description: Need cash? One tap. No lock-ups. No penalties. Processed instantly. Bank transfer times may vary.

howItWorks.transitionHook: That's the process. Here's what you actually get.

getPaid.headline: Get paid without the cut
getPaid.body: Your customers pay. You keep 100%. Instantly.

payAnyone.headline: Pay anyone, anywhere, instantly
payAnyone.body: Contractors, suppliers, freelancers. Worldwide. No fees. Real-time

adelaide.headline: Adelaide watches your money
adelaide.body: Market intelligence for business owners. No $500-an-hour advisor needed.

features.transitionHook: But here's the part nobody else is doing.

fees.header: What it costs. All of it.
fees.subtitle: No hidden fees. No minimum balances. No monthly charges. Here's every fee, on the table.
fees.disclaimer: *diBoaS fee shown. Third-party network fees may apply (typically less than $0.01).
fees.pricingNote: Pricing comparisons based on publicly available rates as of February 2026. Ranges reflect common pricing across major providers. Actual competitor pricing varies by provider, volume, and agreement terms.
fees.example: Receive $1,000 in payments: you keep $1,000 in your diBoaS account. Cash out to your bank: $995.20 (after {cashOutRate} cash-out fee). Still cheaper than the $970 to $980 a card processor leaves you.
fees.expandableToggle: No hidden fees. No minimum balances. No monthly charges. See all fees.
fees.footerLine: Every fee. On the table. Nothing else.
fees.transitionHook: Still reading? Good. Let's make sure this actually fits.

fitAssessment.header: Is this right for your business?

goodFit.title: Good Fit
goodFit.description: Your business accepts card payments and you're tired of the 2 to 3% cut. Your company has cash sitting idle earning almost nothing.
items: Tired of losing 2 to 3% on card payments.
Cash sitting idle earning almost nothing.
You want full control over your money.
Comfortable with a different risk for better returns.

notAFit.title: Not a Fit
notAFit.description: You need government deposit insurance above everything else. You have zero tolerance for any risk.
items: You need government deposit insurance above all.
Prefer traditional banks even if they cost more.
Need someone else to manage your money.

versionA: I grew up watching my grandmother Adelaide navigate a financial system that wasn't designed for her. She deserved better tools. So does every business owner like you.

diBoaS is headquartered in Berlin, Germany, building for businesses in the US, EU, and Brazil. I've spent 20+ years working in Products and IT across Brazil, the US, Japan, and Germany. Now I'm building the financial tool I wish every small business and startup had.
versionB: I grew up watching my grandmother Adelaide navigate a financial system that wasn't designed for her. She deserved better tools. So does every business owner like you.

diBoaS is being established in Berlin, Germany, building for businesses in the US, EU, Brazil, with plans to expand to additional markets. I've spent 20+ years working in Products and IT across Brazil, the US, Japan, and Germany. Now I'm building the financial tool I wish every small business and startup had.
versionC: I grew up watching my grandmother Adelaide navigate a financial system that wasn't designed for her. She deserved better tools. So does every business owner like you.

We're building diBoaS from Berlin, Germany, for businesses in the US, EU, and Brazil. I've spent 20+ years working in Products and IT across Brazil, the US, Japan, and Germany. Now I'm building the financial tool I wish every small business and startup had.

catch.question: What's the catch?
catch.answer:
We charge small fees when money moves. Free when you receive payments. Free when you invest. {sellRate} when you sell or close a position. {cashOutRate} when you cash out.

If you receive $10,000 in payments, we keep $0. If you invest $10,000, we keep $0. If you sell $10,000, we keep $39. If you earn nothing and send nothing, we earn nothing.

No hidden fees. No minimum balances. No monthly charges. No catch.

smbOrStartup.question: Is this for small businesses or startups?
smbOrStartup.answer:
Both. If you're a coffee shop losing 3% on every card payment, we help you keep that money. If you're a startup with $500,000 idle in the bank earning 0.5%, we help it earn more.

The tools are the same. The math just looks different.

safety.question: Is my money safe?
safety.answerA:
Your money is secured by you. Your wallet, your keys. No one at diBoaS can access your funds without your authorization.

That said, this isn't a bank account. Your funds work through new technology. The value can fluctuate, and you could lose some or all of your investment. There is no deposit insurance.

We show you both sides, the opportunities and the risks, always.
safety.answerB:
Your money is protected by multi-party security. Your authorization is required for every transaction. DiBoaS holds a partial key share for recovery purposes, but cannot unilaterally move your funds.

That said, this isn't a bank account. Your funds work through new technology. The value can fluctuate, and you could lose some or all of your investment. There is no deposit insurance.

We show you both sides, the opportunities and the risks, always.

liquidity.question: Can I access my money anytime?
liquidity.answer:
Yes. No lock-ups. You set the floor: "always keep $50,000 liquid." We only deploy what's above that.

Need cash? One tap. We process it instantly. Bank transfer times may vary. No penalties. No questions.

payments.question: How do instant payments work?
payments.answer:
Traditional wire transfers go through correspondent banks. Your bank, their bank, maybe another bank, then the recipient's bank. Each step takes time and charges fees.

With diBoaS, payments go direct. Your wallet to their wallet. Done.

Your freelancer in Buenos Aires gets paid in seconds, at the real exchange rate, for free. Not $25 to $50 and 3 business days.

compliance.question: What about compliance and tax reporting?
compliance.answer:
We built diBoaS for real businesses with real compliance needs.

Monthly statements formatted for your accounting software. Transaction history with full audit trail. Tax documentation at year end. Board-ready reports your CFO will actually understand.

We know you're going to get audited eventually. We make sure you're ready.

whereMoneyGoes.question: Where does my money actually go?
whereMoneyGoes.answer:
Your money is placed into established financial systems that have operated for 3+ years, survived multiple market crashes, and are independently audited for security.

Full details, including names, track records, and our selection criteria, are published on our Strategies page. No signup required.

We chose these systems because they're transparent, battle-tested, and you can see exactly where your funds are at any time.

whyCantTouch.question: Why can't diBoaS touch my money?
whyCantTouch.answerA:
This is the whole point of how we're built.

Traditional finance: you deposit money, it becomes the bank's money, and they owe you a balance.

diBoaS: your money stays in your own wallet. We provide the software that helps you deploy it to earning systems. But we never have access to move it ourselves.

If diBoaS goes bankrupt, your money is still yours. No one at diBoaS can move your funds. Every transaction requires your approval.

More control for you. Less risk from us.
whyCantTouch.answerB:
This is a core part of how we're built.

Traditional finance: you deposit money, it becomes the bank's money, and they owe you a balance.

diBoaS: your money is protected by multi-party security. We hold a partial key share for account recovery purposes, but every transaction requires your explicit approval. We cannot unilaterally move your funds.

If diBoaS experiences issues, your funds remain protected by the multi-party security system. Every transaction requires your authorization.

More protection for you. Less risk from us.

risk.question: What's the actual risk?
risk.answer:
Let's be honest.

The systems your money goes into are built on code. Code can have vulnerabilities. We reduce this by only using systems with significant total value secured, multiple independent security audits, years of track record through market events, and by spreading your money across multiple independent systems.

Zero risk? No. Nothing is, including your bank.

The real question: are better returns worth a different risk profile? For some businesses, yes. For others, no. Both are valid.

audited.question: Has diBoaS been audited?
audited.answer:
We're a pre-launch platform. Our strategies are stress-tested against historical crashes and real-world scenarios, and we use audited, established protocols. As we grow, we plan to pursue independent third-party audits.

For full details on the systems and technology behind each strategy, visit our Strategies and Protocols pages.

footer.riskDisclaimer: diBoaS connects you to decentralized finance systems. Returns are not guaranteed. Past performance does not predict future results. Involves risks including code vulnerabilities, market fluctuations, and access challenges. Only use funds you can afford to risk. diBoaS is not a bank. No deposit insurance applies.

US regulatory treatment of DeFi is evolving. You are responsible for determining whether your use of this interface complies with applicable laws.

footer.closing: diBoaS is a technology platform, not a bank or financial advisor. All financial decisions are your own responsibility.
